title: Windows bootstrap/install/onboarding fixes
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm test passes including @happytg/shared Windows home resolution cases
Codex detection handles Windows PATH/Path, PATHEXT, codex.cmd shims, and doctor/verify stop reporting false negatives when codex --version works
Bootstrap/onboarding explicitly handles Telegram bot token setup, invalid token guidance, and fast path to /pair without exposing secrets
Bootstrap/onboarding reports Redis absent/stopped/running states and explains the 6379 compose conflict path without unsafe auto-actions
Bootstrap/onboarding checks critical ports including 3001, 4000, 4100, 4200, 6379 and gives actionable override guidance including Windows PowerShell examples
README and install/quickstart/bootstrap docs reflect the new first-start flow and supported alternative port selection
Versioning is bumped using the existing repo scheme with a structured release summary aligned to actual scope
